title: [codereview-P4] Inconsistent casing and terminology in DAD note (dodag_id vs DODAGID, local_entropy undefined)
description: Spec uses DODAG ID consistently elsewhere. Define or use existing term for local entropy. Minor but per 'fix ALL' policy. discovered-from:bo37 gl2r vfl0. This is pass 2 finding.
close_reason: Fixed casing to DODAGID and clarified 'local 32-bit entropy'. Third codereview pass found no further P0-P3 issues (P4 opinion only, addressed). All findings from 3 passes fixed; spec updates complete and clean. No bikeshedding.
